meaning: n.苏门答腊人,苏门答腊之印尼语adj.苏门答腊岛(人)的
examples: Globally, a third of Sumatran cubs in zoos don't make it to adulthood, so I decided to give them round-the-clock care at home.
The West Sumatran capital, Padang, with about a million residents, is near the epicenter.
Sumatran tigers are a critically endangered subspecies from Indonesia, of which fewer than 400 remain, according to the conservation group WWF.
